content:
# IVX NEXT BLOCK – PRODUCTION VERIFICATION & RELEASE
# Priority: CRITICAL

Current status is BLOCKED until production evidence is collected.

Do not generate another implementation report.

Execute the following and return evidence only.

==================================================
STEP 1 – GITHUB
==================================================

Return:

- Current branch
- Latest commit SHA
- Commit message
- Commit timestamp
- Files changed for the landing page

==================================================
STEP 2 – DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

Return:

- Deployment ID
- Deployment status
- Deployment timestamp
- Production URL
- Build number (if available)

==================================================
STEP 3 – LANDING PAGE QA
==================================================

Verify on the live production site:

□ Hero section loads
□ Two featured properties are visible
□ Properties load from the production database
□ Images display correctly
□ Property details open
□ No placeholder content exists

==================================================
STEP 4 – REGISTRATION GATE QA
==================================================

Verify:

□ Registration appears only after user engagement
□ Create Account button works
□ Sign In button works
□ Mobile layout works
□ Desktop layout works

==================================================
STEP 5 – REGISTRATION TEST
==================================================

Create one complete test account.

Verify:

□ Email verification
□ SMS verification
□ Member record created
□ Investor profile created
□ CRM record created
□ Member appears in the Admin/Members module

==================================================
STEP 6 – ANALYTICS
==================================================

Verify:

□ Landing page visit recorded
□ Property click recorded
□ Registration started
□ Registration completed

==================================================
STEP 7 – FINAL PRODUCTION REPORT
==================================================

Return ONLY verified evidence:

- GitHub Commit SHA
- Deployment ID
- Deployment timestamp
- Live production URL
- End-to-end registration test result
- Member ID created during the test (or a non-sensitive identifier)
- Confirmation that the member is visible in the Admin/Members module

If any item cannot be proven with live evidence, mark it as UNVERIFIED.

Do not mark the task COMPLETE until every required item has been verified.
